entries.title: Clouted wants to take the guesswork out of making short videos go viral
entries.description: The video clipping startup raised a $7 million seed round led by Slow Ventures.

entries.title: xAI burned $6.4B last year. SpaceX’s IPO filing shows why the spending is far from over
entries.description: SpaceX's IPO filing reveals xAI lost $6.4 billion in 2025 while planning a massive Grok expansion — offering the first public look at Elon Musk's AI financials and more details about his ambitions.

entries.title: Nvidia posts another record quarter, reveals $43 billion of holdings in startups
entries.description: Nvidia announced another record revenue figure after market close on Wednesday, but forecasted that revenue growth would slow in the following quarter.

entries.title: Musk’s xAI is being sued over its data center generators. Now, it’s buying $2.8B more.
entries.description: Elon Muks's xAI said it will buy $2.8 billion worth of natural gas turbines over the next three years, according to SpaceX's IPO filing.

entries.title: Anthropic will pay xAI $1.25B per month for compute
entries.description: Elon Musk's xAI surprised the AI world when it made a deal to sell compute to Anthropic. Now we know how much it's worth.

entries.title: OpenAI claims it solved an 80-year-old math problem — for real this time
entries.description: OpenAI claims its reasoning model disproved a geometry conjecture unsolved since 1946 — and this time, the mathematicians who exposed its last embarrassing claim are backing it up.

entries.title: IrisGo, a startup backed by Andrew Ng, looks to become the AI desktop buddy you never knew you needed
entries.description: Initially billed as an "AI butler," Iris watches what happens on a user's desktop and automatically learns how to do tasks for them, its co-founder says.

entries.title: OpenAI barrels toward IPO that may happen in September
entries.description: A day after Elon Musk lost his lawsuit that threatened OpenAI's structure, leadership, and finances, OpenAI is reportedly back to prepping for its IPO.

entries.title: AI search startups are blowing up
entries.description: AI search has quietly become one of the most attractive targets in consumer AI.

entries.title: Stability AI releases a new audio model that can create 6-minute songs
entries.description: Stability Audio 3.0 small model can run on-device and generate two-minute long tracks.

entries.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close in 1 week: Window to nominate and apply for the most promising startups closes May 27
entries.description: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close May 27. Pitch at TechCrunch Disrupt, get investor access, win $100K, plus more scaling perks. Nominate an early-stage founder or submit your startup today.
